query: Analyze a tapered wing designed for regional turboprop cruise: span 25 m, root chord 2.5 m, taper 0.4, sweep 10 deg, dihedral 3 deg, t/c 0.12. Viscous drag on, wave drag off. Sweep alpha from -4 to 16 deg at Mach 0.45 and Mach 0.55, altitude 6000 m (rho=0.66 kg/m3). Plot CL vs alpha, L/D vs alpha, and drag polar for both Mach numbers.

Minimize drag on a CRM wing at Mach 0.78, altitude 11000 m (rho=0.365 kg/m3). DVs: alpha (-10 to 10 deg), twist_cp (3 CPs, -6 to 6 deg), chord_cp (3 CPs, 0.75 to 1.25). Constraint: CL = 0.45. Report optimal twist distribution and final CD.

Three-point drag minimization on a rectangular wing, span 14 m, root chord 2.4 m. Point 0: Mach 0.6, altitude 8000 m, CL=0.40. Point 1: Mach 0.72, altitude 10000 m, CL=0.50. Point 2: Mach 0.78, altitude 11000 m, CL=0.55. DVs: alpha per point, twist_cp (5 CPs, -4 to 6 deg). Objective: minimize weighted sum of CD (weights 0.25, 0.35, 0.40).

Minimize fuelburn for a rectangular wing (span 10 m, root chord 1.5 m) with tube spar. Cruise: Mach 0.45, altitude 4000 m (rho=0.82 kg/m³), W0=2000 kg, CT=9.8e-6/s, range 2000 km. Material: E=70 GPa, G=30 GPa, yield=500 MPa, density=2700 kg/m³, safety factor=1.5. DVs: alpha (-10 to 10 deg), twist_cp (3 CPs, -5 to 5 deg), thickness_cp (3 CPs, 0.01 to 0.15 m). Constraints: structural failure ≤ 0, L=W.

Minimize fuel burn of a uCRM wingbox wing at Mach 0.82, altitude 12500 m (rho=0.31 kg/m3). Material: aluminum E=70 GPa, G=26 GPa, yield=400 MPa, safety=1.5, density=2700 kg/m3. W0=145000 kg, reserve fuel 18000 kg, range 12000 km, CT=0.50/3600/s. DVs: twist_cp (4 CPs, -10 to 10 deg), spar_thickness_cp (4 CPs, 0.003 to 0.08 m), skin_thickness_cp (4 CPs, 0.003 to 0.08 m), t_over_c_cp (4 CPs, 0.08 to 0.15), alpha_maneuver (-10 to 10 deg, initial 3 deg), fuel_mass (10000 to 100000 kg, initial 30000 kg). Constraints: CL=0.48 at cruise, structural failure <= 0 at 2.0g maneuver, fuel volume delta >= 0.

Minimize the structural mass of a rectangular wing (span 8 m, root chord 1.2 m) with a tube spar. Apply a total upward load of 1e5 N distributed across spanwise nodes. Material: E=70 GPa, G=30 GPa, yield stress=500 MPa, density=2700 kg/m³, safety factor=1.5. Use 3 thickness_cp control points with bounds 0.01 to 0.5 m. Constraints: structural failure index <= 0, thickness_intersects <= 0.
